channel.title: Vue on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Vue on Arrans github.io

item.title: NativeScript/NativeScript
item.description: ⚡ Empowering JavaScript with native platform APIs. ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, Capacitor, Ionic, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Dart (Flutter) and you name it compatible.

item.title: codesandbox/codesandbox-client
item.description: An online IDE for rapid web development

item.title: misterGF/CoPilot
item.description: Responsive Bootstrap 3 Admin Template based on AdminLTE with vue.js

item.title: antoniandre/vue-cal
item.description: A Vue 2 & 3 full calendar, no dependency, no BS. 🤘

item.title: robinvdvleuten/vuex-persistedstate
item.description: 💾 Persist and rehydrate your Vuex state between page reloads.

item.title: fingerthief/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.

item.title: hexops/vecty
item.description: Vecty lets you build responsive and dynamic web frontends in Go using WebAssembly, competing with modern web frameworks like React & VueJS.

item.title: vuesion/vuesion
item.description: Vuesion is a boilerplate that empowers product teams to build faster with modern best practices across engineering and design. It features a full-stack framework, comprehensive design system, robust testing, and seamless internationalization.

item.title: iliyaZelenko/tiptap-vuetify
item.description: Vuetify editor. Component simplifies integration tiptap editor with vuetify.

item.title: chmln/vue-wysiwyg
item.description: A lightweight WYSIWYG HTML editor for Vue.js

item.title: christianmalek/vuex-rest-api
item.description: A utility to simplify the use of REST APIs with Vuex
